## What this changes

Briefly describe the change and the reader-facing effect, not just the diff.

## Type of change

- [ ] Guidance / reference improvement
- [ ] New AI tell or example
- [ ] Scanner change (`scripts/copy_scan.py`)
- [ ] Test prompts / evaluation samples
- [ ] Docs / repo tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Preserves the core principles (no fabrication, no voice flattening, lean `SKILL.md`, cluster-based diagnosis, in scope)
- [ ] `make check` passes
- [ ] Updated `tests/test-prompts.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]`
